description: [ELON] Create webhook processing queue using in-memory queue (or Redis if available). Move webhook processing to async queue with retry logic (3 attempts with exponential backoff: 1s, 5s, 30s). Store failed webhooks in dead letter queue table for manual reconciliation.
successCriteria: Webhook handler adds job to queue immediately, returns 200
Queue processes webhooks async with retry logic
Failed webhooks (after 3 retries) written to dead_letter_queue table
Queue processing duration tracked and logged
